jobDescription: Roblox is ushering in the next generation of entertainment, allowing people to imagine, create, and play together in immersive, user-generated worlds. We’re the one and only fastest-growing entertainment platform that lets anyone teach themselves how to code, publish, and monetize any experience imaginable—across any device—reaching millions of players across the globe. The impact that you can have at Roblox is powerful. We’re looking for someone who’s eager to take on a meaningful role in the success of Roblox on a massive scale. Someone who takes play seriously, but also isn’t afraid to have some fun either. Someone who’s ready to take Roblox—and their career—to the next level. In 2018, we were honored to be recognized as a Certified Great Place to Work®. We’ve fostered a company culture that empowers people to do the most defining work of their career in an environment that’s made up of the most passionate, team-oriented, visionary, crazy-smart people you’ll ever meet. Join the Roblox team where play rules and the possibilities are endless. Roblox is creating the future of play. Fundamental to that future, powerful creation tools enable our developers to create amazing, transformational experiences. We see the future of creation running completely in the cloud and integrating collaboration at a fundamental level. Our existing Studio product, and the extensive platform APIs we provide, have enabled a community of millions of developers to create compelling content, and we’re building from that starting point. Roblox’ Game Engine is at the heart of it. As the Director of Product, Game Engine you will lead the product strategy and vision for Roblox’ Game engine, with the ultimate objective to elevate it to world class and enable the transition of Roblox titles to triple A quality. From the defined vision you will distill product specifications and requirements and work with a team of world class engineers, designers and artists to deliver them to players of all ages. You are: A Game Engine Product leader with strong engineering background and 10+ years experience in building game engine features Obsessed with end user experience and use it as the cornerstone to create road maps and features A true gamer, fluent in gaming language, genuinely interested in what's going on in the market, where the bar is and where it’s moving Smart about trade offs between what "looks good" and what is technically feasible, focused on relentless prioritization to generate tangible results.  You're not just a “pie in the sky” thinker. Knowledgeable about the game creation process, tooling around it, developer ecosystems etc Usability Focused: Capable of conveying your ideas through detailed specs and/or wireframes. A dynamic leader, comfortable with working in a fast paced environment, with competing resources and priorities, through planning, development, and launch. A strategic thinker, coupled with an entrepreneurial attitude along and an ability to contribute to product design, execution, and all things go-to-market. A self starter: High degree of self direction and independent drive. An Outstanding communicator: both technical and product You will: Drive to the go-forward vision for Game Engine, to enable Roblox to deliver AAA quality content Align senior leadership and key stakeholders around product roadmap Write technical specs, driven by a deep analysis and understanding of developers and end users’ pain points Balance and Prioritize new features with existing backlog initiatives and align them with product strategy Engage with developers on designing and testing out changes Develop roll-out strategies Own measurement of adoption rates of new features Build and Lead a team of smart technical product managers to create a world class game engine Be incredibly truth-seeking and collect all data necessary to inform product direction, whether in the form of competitive intel, customer behavior, or other business metrics You'll Love: Excellent medical, dental, and vision coverage A rewarding 401k program Flexible vacation policy Free catered lunches five times a week and several fully stocked kitchens with unlimited snacks Onsite fitness center and fitness program credit Annual Cal Train Go Pass A Roblox Admin badge for your avatar Roblox – Powering Imagination
